title: Planning Parameters for Non High Rise Buildings

categories.label: Up to 16 dwellings or up to 300 sqm commercial; small developments
categories.max_height_default: GF+2F or Stilt+3F, max 14m (amended by GO 69/2024; was 12m)
categories.max_height_ews: GF+1F or Stilt+2F, max 10m (amended by GO 69/2024; was 9m)

categories.label: Exceeding 16 dwellings or exceeding 300 sqm commercial; height up to 18.30m

key_provisos.multiple_road_frontage: FSB from the wider road; remaining sides take side/rear setback (Expl.2(iv)); in CBA min 1m.
key_provisos.max_height_ceiling: 18.30m, but ornamental/non-habitable structures (water tank, mast, gopuram) up to 30.5m (Expl.2(iii)).
key_provisos.public_buildings: Kalyana mandapam, assembly/exhibition halls, hospitals, hotels, theatres, malls: setback all around >= 6m (Expl.2(vii)).
key_provisos.basement: <=1.2m above GL, headroom >=2.4m, not in required setbacks needed for fire movement (sub-clause 20).
key_provisos.internal_vehicular_access: Clear 7.2m width, open to sky, within 50m of every block (sub-clause 9).
